title: Adapt Reusable Components to Local Space
summary: Build and verify responsive container queries in inventory resource card in main and sidebar containers through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain responsive container queries from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply responsive container queries without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

content.text: Container queries let a component respond to its own available space rather than the viewport. Establish an appropriate query container, keep the base usable, and query inline-size or style conditions for local enhancements. Size containment has layout consequences, container units need fallbacks, and viewport queries remain appropriate for page-level environment changes. Apply it to inventory resource card in main and sidebar containers.
